infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Dofek reads your health data to sync workouts, heart rate, sleep, and body metrics to your personal dashboard.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Dofek writes dietary data back to Apple Health so your nutrition is tracked alongside activity data.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: Dofek records accelerometer data to analyze movement patterns, detect activities, and provide fitness insights.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Dofek connects to your WHOOP strap via Bluetooth to record accelerometer data during workouts.

plugins.cameraPermission: Dofek uses the camera to scan food barcodes.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Dofek records your GPS track during workouts to show your route and distance.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Dofek records your GPS track during workouts to show your route and distance, even when the app is in the background.
